text:
There was once a small village nestled among towering mountains. The villagers lived contently, harvesting their crops, caring for their livestock, and spending their days exploring the natural beauty surrounding them.

One bright morning, a strange goblin-like creature stumbled into town. It had shimmering green skin and unusual, elongated talons instead of hands. It waved awkwardly, blinking large dark eyes.

The townsfolk were astonished. This wasn't just any goblin—they had never seen one so peculiar!

Curious, they approached the mysterious visitor. The goblin seemed frightened by their curiosity.

"Well!" exclaimed one villager, "You must be lost!"

"No!" the creature whimpered. "I've been wandering lost since yesterday!"

"How do you eat?" another asked.

"I snag little worms from streams!" it replied enthusiastically.

A young boy named Tommy chimed in, curious. "You've got big claws! Can you snag something big?"
